response.justification: Bogdan is an exceptionally strong candidate with deep expertise in geospatial data processing, distributed systems, and high-performance computing, which are all critical for this role. His experience with C/C++ and Dlang, coupled with a strong emphasis on quality assurance and a demonstrated ability to learn and adapt to new technologies, makes him an excellent fit for designing and operating routing data pipelines at scale. While specific 'routing tiling' experience isn't highlighted, his foundational skills and relevant project work suggest a strong capability to excel in this domain.
strengths: Extensive experience in developing and maintaining Geo-Data platforms and GIS applications.
Proven track record in building high-performance, low-latency distributed systems and microservices.
Strong background in systems-level programming (C/C++, Dlang) and rigorous quality assurance practices.
concerns: Direct experience specifically with 'routing tiling' or navigation guidance solutions is not explicitly detailed.
Most recent primary systems programming language is Dlang, with C++ experience being a few years older.
Specific experience with integrating 'real-time traffic signals' into data pipelines is not explicitly mentioned.
